title: Checkout Sessions API
excerpt: A Checkout Session represents your customer’s session as they pay for one-time purchases or subscriptions through [Checkout](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/payments/checkout.md) or [Payment Links](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/payments/payment-links.md). We recommend creating a new Session each time your customer attempts to pay. Once payment is successful, the Checkout Session will contain a reference to the [Customer](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/api/customers.md), and either the successful [PaymentIntent](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/api/payment_intents.md) or an active [Subscription](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/api/subscriptions.md). You can create a Checkout Session on your server and redirect to its URL to begin Checkout.…
